executive_summary: Acme Cloud Solutions presents a HIGH risk posture with a composite score of 71, driven primarily by the absence of a signed Data Processing Agreement and undocumented MFA enforcement across privileged accounts. Onboarding must be paused until a GDPR-compliant DPA is executed and SOC 2 Type II audit evidence dated within the last 12 months is provided.
top_critical_findings: Data Processing Agreement (DPA) absent — GDPR Art. 28 violation
MFA not enforced for privileged access — undocumented in security policy
SOC 2 Type II certificate expired 14 months ago
Liability cap limited to 1-month fees — materially insufficient
No breach notification SLA specified in contract
conditions_for_approval: Execute GDPR-compliant DPA before any data sharing begins
Provide current SOC 2 Type II audit report (within 12 months)
Confirm MFA enforcement policy in writing with evidence
Negotiate liability cap to minimum 12 months of contract value
